requirement_topic.en: Noise Emission and the Absence of an Outdoor-Noise Directive
requirement_topic.zh: 噪声排放与户外噪声指令的缺位
requirement_topic.zht: 噪聲排放與戶外噪聲指令的缺位

summary.en: Brazil does not have a direct equivalent of the EU outdoor-noise Directive 2000/14/EC, so there is no stand-alone guaranteed-sound-power marking or fixed noise label mandated for power tools at market entry. Noise is instead addressed through general consumer product-safety duties, any noise or vibration declaration clauses inside the applicable ABNT NBR IEC 62841 standard, and workplace and environmental noise rules that apply to use rather than to placing the product on the market.
summary.zh: 巴西没有等同欧盟户外噪声指令 2000/14/EC 的直接对应法规，因此在市场准入时并无针对电动工具强制的独立保证声功率标志或固定噪声标签。噪声转由一般消费品产品安全义务、适用 ABNT NBR IEC 62841 标准内的任何噪声或振动声明条款，以及适用于使用环节而非投放市场的工作场所与环境噪声规则处理。
summary.zht: 巴西沒有等同歐盟戶外噪聲指令 2000/14/EC 的直接對應法規，因此在市場准入時並無針對電動工具強制的獨立保證聲功率標誌或固定噪聲標籤。噪聲轉由一般消費品產品安全義務、適用 ABNT NBR IEC 62841 標準內的任何噪聲或振動聲明條款，以及適用於使用環節而非投放市場的工作場所與環境噪聲規則處理。

standards_or_laws: No Brazilian equivalent of EU Directive 2000/14/EC on outdoor equipment noise
Noise and vibration declaration clauses within the applicable ABNT NBR IEC 62841 standard where present
General consumer product-safety obligations (Brazilian Consumer Defence Code)
Workplace and environmental noise rules apply to use, not to market entry

summary.en: China files typically include a noise and vibration emission declaration generated within GB/T 3883 series testing, but there is no China mark equivalent to an EU guaranteed-sound-power label either. The China baseline is therefore a test-report declaration rather than a separate noise conformity mark.
summary.zh: 中国文件通常包含在 GB/T 3883 系列测试中生成的噪声与振动排放声明，但中国同样没有等同欧盟保证声功率标签的标志。因此中国基线是测试报告声明，而非独立的噪声符合性标志。
summary.zht: 中國文件通常包含在 GB/T 3883 系列測試中生成的噪聲與振動排放聲明，但中國同樣沒有等同歐盟保證聲功率標籤的標誌。因此中國基線是測試報告聲明，而非獨立的噪聲符合性標誌。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 3883 series noise and vibration declaration
No China equivalent of an EU guaranteed-sound-power noise mark

gap.en: Because neither Brazil nor China imposes an EU-style outdoor-noise mark, the practical gap is honest and small: an exporter should ensure the noise and vibration declaration in the ABNT NBR IEC 62841 test report is complete and accurate, and not assume an EU noise label is needed for Brazil. The real attention point is correct user-information disclosure, not a separate Brazilian noise approval.
gap.zh: 由于巴西与中国均不要求欧盟式户外噪声标志，实际差距诚实且不大：出口商应确保 ABNT NBR IEC 62841 测试报告中的噪声与振动声明完整准确，且不应误以为巴西需要欧盟噪声标签。真正关注点是正确的用户信息披露，而非独立的巴西噪声核准。
gap.zht: 由於巴西與中國均不要求歐盟式戶外噪聲標誌，實際差距誠實且不大：出口商應確保 ABNT NBR IEC 62841 測試報告中的噪聲與振動聲明完整準確，且不應誤以為巴西需要歐盟噪聲標籤。真正關注點是正確的用戶資訊披露，而非獨立的巴西噪聲核准。

target.en: Not a stand-alone mandatory market-entry mark: Brazil has no outdoor-noise directive equivalent, so noise is covered indirectly through the ABNT NBR IEC 62841 declaration and general product-safety duties; workplace and environmental noise rules bind use rather than market entry.
target.zh: 非独立强制市场准入标志：巴西无户外噪声指令对应法规，故噪声经 ABNT NBR IEC 62841 声明与一般产品安全义务间接覆盖；工作场所与环境噪声规则约束使用环节，而非市场准入。
target.zht: 非獨立強制市場准入標誌：巴西無戶外噪聲指令對應法規，故噪聲經 ABNT NBR IEC 62841 聲明與一般產品安全義務間接覆蓋；工作場所與環境噪聲規則約束使用環節，而非市場准入。

cn.en: China baseline is a GB/T 3883 series noise and vibration declaration, with no separate noise conformity mark.
cn.zh: 中国基线为 GB/T 3883 系列噪声与振动声明，无独立噪声符合性标志。
cn.zht: 中國基線為 GB/T 3883 系列噪聲與振動聲明，無獨立噪聲符合性標誌。

source.publisher: INMETRO (Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No separate Brazilian outdoor-noise approval applies; the honest requirement is a complete and accurate noise and vibration declaration inside the ABNT NBR IEC 62841 documentation. Do not assume an EU 2000/14/EC noise label is needed for Brazil.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴西不适用独立的户外噪声核准；诚实的要求是 ABNT NBR IEC 62841 文件内完整准确的噪声与振动声明。不应误以为巴西需要欧盟 2000/14/EC 噪声标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴西不適用獨立的戶外噪聲核准；誠實的要求是 ABNT NBR IEC 62841 文件內完整準確的噪聲與振動聲明。不應誤以為巴西需要歐盟 2000/14/EC 噪聲標籤。
